JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERKS JULIE WILSON/NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER PATRICK HEARD. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON NOV-12-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 002, OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE. CASE SETTLED, SENT TO PUT THE TERMS ON THE RECORD.

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON NOV-12-2002 IN DEPT. 002 - PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT WHEN CASE CALLED. MATTER SETTLED AND STIPULATED JUDGMENT WAS SIGNED BY DEFENDANT. SEE SMOOTH MINUTES FOR TERMS OF JUDGMENT. JUDGE: O. MARIE-VICTOIRE, CLERK J. BAUBEL, NOT REPORTED. (DEPT. 002 POLK STREET)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLARD, RODNEY H RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOLQUITT, TONDALAYO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 170-6TH STREET #1, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR TERMS OF JUDGMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
